settings.editor: Each space is meticulously designed and fully equipped. Walk in, plug in, create — we handle the rest.
Cyclorama walls, Profoto lighting, and seamless backdrops for editorial shoots.
Soundproofed rooms with broadcast-grade mics, mixers, and warm acoustic design.
Cinema-grade lighting grid, dolly tracks, and a production-ready cyc wall.
Private meeting space for team sessions, client discussions, and workshops.
Open natural-light loft for events, workshops, brand activations, and more.
Ring lights, vertical setups, and props built for short-form creators.
Every Stuvia studio comes fully equipped — from broadcast mics to cinema lighting — and a host who handles the setup so you can focus on the work.

settings.sg_icon_description: Filter by studio type, size, location, and available amenities to find your perfect creative space.
Select hourly, half-day, or full-day slots. Real-time availability so you always know what's open.
Secure your booking instantly with our streamlined checkout. No hidden fees, no surprises.
Walk in and start creating. Everything is set up, cleaned, and ready for your session.

settings.editor: We offer project-based packages and monthly memberships for creators and agencies who need consistent access.
A few of the questions we hear most often. Need something specific? Talk to our team — we're quick to reply.

items.item_title: What's included in the hourly rate?
Do you offer discounts for longer projects?

settings.editor: Every booking includes the room, core equipment for that studio type, fast Wi-Fi, coffee and an on-site host to help you set up.
Yes — additional lenses, lighting, backdrops, props and crew can be added at checkout or by talking to our team.
Most studios start at one hour. Video and multi-purpose spaces have a two-hour minimum to allow proper setup.
Half-day, full-day and multi-day bookings come with progressively better rates. Reach out for custom project pricing.
Yes — convenient on-site parking is available for clients, team members, and equipment loading during your booking.
